ddls:
CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "sold_to_number" INTEGER /* Sold-to number for accounting purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the library */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the library's website */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the library */,
  "library_type" TEXT /* Type of library (e.g., public, academic) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the branch if the library is part of a larger system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patron_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "total_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of patrons registered all time */,
  "new_patrons_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of new patrons in the last month */,
  "patrons_served_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of patrons served in the last month */,
  "total_active_patrons" INTEGER /* Number of active patrons */,
  "total_inactive_patrons" INTEGER /* Number of inactive patrons */,
  "average_visits_per_patron" REAL /* Average number of visits per patron */,
  "average_books_borrowed_per_patron" REAL /* Average number of books borrowed per patron */,
  "patron_age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patrons (e.g., children, adults, seniors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patron_metrics_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "sales_last_month" REAL /* Sales revenue for the last month */,
  "circs_last_month" INTEGER /* Number of circulations for the last month */,
  "sales_ytd" REAL /* Sales revenue year-to-date */,
  "circs_ytd" INTEGER /* Number of circulations year-to-date */,
  "pct_circs_ytd" REAL /* Percentage of total circulations year-to-date */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the library */,
  "budget_spent_ytd" REAL /* Budget spent year-to-date */,
  "budget_remaining_ytd" REAL /* Budget remaining year-to-date */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average value of a transaction */,
  "total_fines_collected" REAL /* Total fines collected year-to-date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., librarian, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, patron engagement) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is shared with other libraries */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "organizer_library_id" INTEGER /* Library ID of the organizer */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., educational, recreational) */,
  "participating_libraries" TEXT /* List of libraries participating in the event */,
  "is_virtual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is virtual */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "participating_libraries" TEXT /* List of libraries participating in the collaboration */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget_allocated" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "budget_spent" REAL /* Budget spent on the project */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes and results of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)
